status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.

data.official_name: Undang-Undang Nomor 27 Tahun 2022 tentang Pelindungan Data Pribadi
alternate_names: Law No. 27/2022 on Personal Data Protection
data.notes: Enacted by the House of Representatives (DPR) September 20, 2022, promulgated October 17, 2022 (State Gazette No. 196/2022). Two-year transition period ended October 17, 2024. Requires a national supervisory body, still being stood up as of this sweep entry.
